scripts.start:preview: APP_ENV=preview APP_LABEL=本机预览 HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=5194 DATA_DIR=./data-preview STATIC_DIR=./dist-preview node server/index.js
scripts.preview:local: npm run preview:prepare-data && npm run build:preview && npm run start:preview
scripts.test: npm run test:legacy && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:new
scripts.typecheck:phase1: tsc -p packages/contracts/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/domain/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/database/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/jobs/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/worker/tsconfig.json && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node,vitest/globals test/phase1/recovery.e2e.test.ts test/phase1/fixtures/feishu-users.ts test/phase1/helpers/processes.ts test/phase1/helpers/test-api-main.ts test/phase1/helpers/controlled-worker-main.ts vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.typecheck:phase2: npm run typecheck:phase1 && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node,vitest/globals test/phase2/library-indexing.e2e.test.ts test/phase2/scale.integration.scale.test.ts test/phase2/helpers/phase2-harness.ts test/phase2/helpers/test-api.ts vitest.phase2.config.ts
scripts.typecheck:phase3: npm run typecheck:phase1 && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node,vitest/globals test/phase3/continuous-query.e2e.test.ts test/phase3/query-recovery.e2e.test.ts test/phase3/query-scale.integration.test.ts test/phase3/helpers/phase3-harness.ts vitest.phase3.config.ts
scripts.typecheck:phase5: npm run typecheck:phase1 && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --types node,vitest/globals test/phase5/rebuild-recovery.e2e.test.ts test/phase5/scale.integration.test.ts test/phase5/helpers/load-runner.ts test/phase5/helpers/phase5-harness.ts test/phase5/fixtures/golden-query.ts test/phase5/fixtures/scale-profile.ts vitest.phase5.config.ts
scripts.verify:new: npm run typecheck:new && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:new
scripts.verify:legacy: npm run test:legacy && npm run lint:legacy && npm run build:legacy
scripts.verify:implementation: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:phase1
scripts.verify:controller: npm run verify && npm run lint && npm run typecheck:phase1 && npm run test:workspace && npm run test:integration
scripts.verify:post-merge: npm run test:project-source && npm run project:check && npm run workspace:audit && npm run controller:health
scripts.verify: npm run verify:legacy && npm run verify:new && npm run dify:manifest:check && npm run test:project-source && npm run project:check
